query: Investigate dispatch latency on the gpt target — read-only audit, no changes to anything.
Look into how isFeatureEnabled falls back when settings.json is malformed — I want to understand it, not modify it.
Audit how the chokidar watcher in src/db/issues-mirror.ts decides when to mirror — read-only walk-through.
Trace the path a Slack message takes from the bolt listener to danxbot_slack_reply — call-chain only, no edits.
Why does the poller skip cards with non-null waiting_on? Walk me through the dispatch filter logic.
How does the worker resolve DANXBOT_WORKER_PORT differently in production versus local dev?
Find out which workers are currently running on the gpt target right now — read-only inventory, no restarts.
Dig into the difference between StallDetector and ApiErrorDetector — read-only comparison of when each fires.
Check on the production worker health — is the dispatch API actually reachable from the dashboard right now? Don't touch anything.
Figure out what triggers a critical_failure flag end-to-end — I'm trying to understand the contract.
Investigate why src/poller/index.test.ts is failing on the new dispatch return shape — and then fix it.
Look into the dispatch hang on DX-244 and patch the bug once you find it.
Audit the SQL queries in src/db/issues-mirror.ts and add the missing indexes you find.
Trace the leak in the worker process and apply the fix once you've located it.
Figure out why my build is broken and apply the patch in the same session.
Dig into the StallDetector code and refactor the nudge logic into a standalone helper module.
Check on the failing test in src/worker/dispatch.test.ts and rewrite the broken spec to match the new behavior.
Find out why dispatches are slow and add a cache layer to the hot path.
Why does spawnAgent leak event listeners? Fix the leak in this same dispatch.
How does the rebase script handle conflicts? Add better error messages while you're in there.
